Dialogue: Phew... Let's take a breather, shall we?
But I don't need to breathe...
As for the nearby resources...
I'll call this one “Lop of the Day.”
Plenty of carrots... Check!
Plenty of Archon loaf... Check!
Would you two <Emphasis>please</Emphasis> take stock of something other than rations?
Simply enchanting, all of it...
I hear there's quicksand fields over yonder.
Would that we could survey them with drones...
Battery functions normal...
Watch your step!
I would, if my exotablet had service here!

We're low on carrots...
Do tell them to send more!
Ohhh, this flavor is heavenly!
Shall I request aid from the base?
Yes! More carrots, please!
Can they deliver them this far out...?
I'll request a case of Archon loaf, and...
Carrots! Lots and lots of them!
It's always the rations with you two...
Oh, to be a mammet at work...
The work's nothing if not invigorating!

Phew...
That's quite a ways down.
Oh! I... I think I'm actually good at this!
You are! Very good indeed!

We'll entrust you with
welding from here on out.
We must archive these environs for posterity.
To think plants could flourish down here...
Well, they <Emphasis>do</Emphasis> seem to get plenty of sunlight.
This should make a fine memento.
Hooray!
Oho, this'll make a fine photo!
And with the tap of a button...
An inspection a day keeps the repair technician away!
Now to check the samples we found...
Apparently, the visitors from Etheirys are on their way as we speak.
Let me check where this shipment is needed...
We better get going soon.
Five...more...minutes...
Don't come crying to me if Mumukko catches you lazing about!
What if the Cosmoliner messes up my hair? I spend hours each morning teasing each strand into place!
Don't tell me we forgot to pack extra hair wax...
Remember, the schedule is all important!
Hup, hup! Hup, hup!
The base is this way!
This way, this way!
I wonder how they're faring back on the moon.
It's up to us to explore this sector! We can't let the initiative down!
Exploring the deep rifts in Phaenna's surface will be a real challenge.
In an emergency, the plan is to...
Checking energy levels...
Energy levels: tip-top!

Energy levels: nearly depleted!
You need a slice of Archon loaf!
O-Oh!? Er...thank you?
We'd like these transported next!
Beautiful. Really beautiful.
As for upcoming projects...
It's around here somewhere...
How long does he expect me to wait?
Don't eat the glass here─it isn't candy.
I'll be strong enough to carry fifty carrots! No─one <Emphasis>hundred</Emphasis> carrots!
Vacuum suits are so powerful!
A tonze of carrots is nothing to them!
I'll develop a taste for this stuff, or die trying. Urp...
Ha! Don't push yourself.
Do you think our suits will be upgraded soon?
Time to work already?
It's over here! I'm sure of it!
Let me check just once more!
Is he <Emphasis>still</Emphasis> looking!?
Good grief, not again...
Where should I take this?
Hold on just a moment.
We can expect more shipments from the moon, I'm sure.
Maybe I should change my vocation to “box carrier.”
You've certainly got the arms for it. I-I mean, you're quite strong.
We're ready for a test flight, I think.
I'll see if I can schedule a time.
Yes! Maintenance is finally over!
Can you carry that to the habitation module?
Carrying is what I do best!
We seem to be missing some machinery...
I'll send in a request.
Plenty of glass here. Just not much to eat...
Shipments from the moon should keep us from starving, at least.
Wouldn't it be nice if we could cultivate our own food?
We made a list, but does it look feasible?
Let's see... Hmm...
Judging by the strata, we can estimate the age of this cavern...
I should reread the data.
It's absolutely essential!
Let's consult with Phasingway.
Tastes like...health.
Those glass protrusions look almost like bubbles.
I can't help but wonder how they formed.
Meteorologically speaking, this star is particularly noteworthy...
As far as the next star goes...
We've been contacted as well.
Or a fabric made of glass fibers... What do you think?
You might be onto something!
...What was our team supposed to be doing, again?
I'll ask Mumukko.
Er... Um...
It can melt about anything, really.
What about glass?
I can't get enough of these carrot drinks!
We've noticed, haha.
Drink too many, and you might sprout bunny ears.
Phaenna's glass is truly remarkable.
I wonder what we'll find on the next star...
So, how do we speed this crater cooling business along?
I say we increase coolant distribution!
It's altogether too hot here!
Nothin' a good dose o' coolant won't fix!
I think we should double up on observation drone patrols.
Can't quite...reach...
If only I was an ilm or two taller!
Time to get going.
Ungh... W-Wait...!
A nibble on a nice nourishing carrot'll soon boost your strength!
Vessel 7 ought to be back soon...
The mechanism's completely fried... Better bring it back to base for repair.
I don't want to see you clambering into the cockpit again! Are we clear?
Forgive me I don't quite believe you...
Listen, I've got some errands to run. No funny business while I'm gone!
As crystal!
Toodle-oo!
Surely a little peek at the cockpit won't do any harm...
What's all this!?
I knew I couldn't trust you!
Wahoo! This is so much fun!
It's not safe up there! Besides, you can hardly reach the controls!
Sorry, sorry... The cockpit was calling out to me!
Better run a quick systems check.
Fully functional.
Now for a test flight.
Here goes!
Flawless!
We'll need to ensure we have ample supplies.
It's time we prepared the backup systems.
Be ready for anything!
Best we prepare a few contingency plans.
Let's prepare for the worst and hope for the best.
Right. Safety first. Act with due caution.

The storm's worse than we feared...
It's imperative we procure more supplies.

Such violent storms...
We'll need to request lightning rods.

These winds are merciless...
We'll be counting on you!
The areas by the crater are completely frozen...
Glass rain is accumulating at the base of Capsule Chasm!
Sounds like the glass rain's caused some incidents...
Good work, everyone!
That should be it for the repairs... Onto cleanup.
Severe thunderstorms are approaching!
Severe thunderstorms are approaching!
Annealing winds are approaching! We expect temperatures to plummet...
Annealing winds are on their way... Expect severe drops in temperature.
We've got large quantities of glass rain incoming!
We've observed an oncoming glass dust storm...
Our machinery could be in grave danger!
If the storms get too close, we're in trouble...
We'll need to ensure the cave doesn't freeze over...
The frigid air might force a system shutdown...
The way the wind's blowing, the crater might suffer damage.
Take care not to slip on the dust as it approaches.
Please deliver your supplies here!
Seems our job here is done! Let's withdraw.
Seems the alert's been lifted. We'll take care of the rest!
The alert's been lifted! Many thanks for your cooperation.
Now comes the cleanup...
Impeccable timing! The repair supply team is this way!
This is the machine repair hub! Please deliver your supplies here!
That should do it...!
We'll need all the help we can get in the plateau!
Good timing! I'll leave the top to you!
You can leave this area to us.
We need assistance in the eastern plateau!
This is a prime opportunity to test our new charging systems!
I pray we get some useful data out of this...
We should be able to utilize the surrounding resources.
We're in dire need of crystal collectors!
By the gods, it's freezing!
Take a break to warm up if you need it.
Mind your step!
Gods, this is dangerous!
Just don't act rashly, and you won't get hurt.
We'll need some assistance harvesting plants and sampling the soil.
A rare specimen indeed...
All right... Time to install these new parts!
Oil suppliers, this way!
Time to show them what you're made of, fishies... Literally.
Dust collectors, over here!
Phew... The tank's nearly filled!
We'll clean this up in one fell swoop.
Now to take some specimens for further study...

The water quality is...
Hmm. Intriguing.
We must needs survey deepwater impesctors in their natural habitat.
Backup supplies will be a necessity...
We should be able to find a use for these...
Glass rain... Astounding, yet vaguely terrifying.
Oh, no... Is the dust filter clogged!?
A “Phaenna” if ever I saw one!
This star is incredible!
Health and safety first! Time for calisthenics!
One, two! Three, four!
Five, six! Seven, eight!
Schedule... Schedule...
...And a few for my comrades on the moon.
A new star! Can you believe it?
I can't wait to start exploring.
And I can't wait for this loaf to be finished...
I wonder what facilities we'll build here!
A proper kitchen, hopefully...
You'll be as pretty as polished glass.
We'll polish till you shine!
What shall come of this, I wonder?
I can't stop the picture fever!
Let's give it our all, everyone!
Aye aye!
Making good progress, I see. Let's keep it up!
Quickly and carefully, please!
Take that, glass!
Rrrgh... The ground is surprisingly tough!
Leave this to me!
This way!
Over here!
To the new Glassblowers' Beacon!
Say, “Carrots, please!”
It's beautiful!
Huzzah!
All right, I'm taking it!
We did a fine job, if I do say so myself.
Try not to blur it this time...
A big step forward.
And a bit of rest, at last.
Just me and my mech. <sigh> What precious moments...
Keep up the good work, everyone!
Even the most mundane scenes are worth a snap, in my book!
Keep those inspections thorough!
Take extra care─we can't afford any mistakes!
No issues detected!
I've never seen you trundle so energetically!
You're the cutest mini rover in the fleet!
When you factor in freight costs, we may as well be hauling gold around.
Behold, Phaenna's very own Cosmoliner!
Three, two, one!
Hold still!
You're standing too close! You won't get us all in frame!
Raw materials take precedence! Rations can wait.
Surely they'd make an exception for carrots?
You polish up well, my mechanized friend.
Musn't overlook even the tiniest flaw...
Faultless construction!
Keep on trundlin', little feller!
At last, Phaenna has a sparkling new habitation module!
Looks like we'll be waiting on proper food supplies for a while longer...
<sigh> No end in sight to the Archon loaf diet...
Huh? Where've they gotten to this time?
Hellooo?
Tsk, I've never met someone so work-shy!
Nap first, work later...
Take a moment to admire these wonderful facilities!
I don't know about you, but all this glass is starting to look rather appetizing!
Err, I think we'd better get you to the infirmary...
The finest welds on Phaenna─even if I do say so myself!
Slow and steady...
Time to weld like I've never welded before!
Look at our lovely new mech hangar!
I'd say that was a job well done!
Hear, hear!
Now I just need a hot meal...
Looks like a proper base of operations now, eh?
It's all coming together.
Best do some maintenance while we have the time.
Is it properly charged?
Drill's in good shape.
Thanks for always hangin' in there.
Let's wipe it down.
Dirt, begone!
Not even a speck of dust will remain!
Raaah! I'm gonna dig like no one's ever dug before!
The base is truly beginning to take shape!
That's it, I'm taking this up with Mumukko!
She does seem like she's fine with a diet of Archon loaf...
Being fussy about the details is what it means to be an artisan.
When you're careless, it shows up in your work.
J-Just the slightest bit nervous...
Look at the mech hangar, in all its glory!
It'd be nice to get a taste of what this star has to offer.
...Think we can eat an impesctor?
Would you look at the cosmoport now!
Dining on the odd farmed fish is a real treat.
Truly.
I'd forgotten to give it a try.
I saw it earlier! A shipment of supplies from the moon!
You mean <Emphasis>food</Emphasis> supplies!? Something besides Archon loaf!?
No chips on the blade.
Fully charged and ready to go.
I see some shards of glass jammed in there...
At last, the base is complete!
And so our maiden survey of a star in the cosmos comes to an end...
It was hard work, but I couldn't have asked for a more fascinating environment.
Gods, a hot meal at last!
Slow down, the food isn't running away.
I think someone's had their fill of Archon loaf...
'Tis a blessed thing to enjoy a peaceful meal.
Certainly better than gnawing on Archon loaf as we work.
Carrots, please!
Good work as always, partner.
Let's make it squeaky clean for the next star!
Squeaky! Squeaky!
Need to find the perfect angle...
Materials appear to be running low. Better make a request to the team on the moon.
Even should the sights change, this flavor does not.
With these readings, there must be a mother lode underground.
So there's more phainite to be found beneath us...
Ah, to explore is to be alive!
Mech ops always make me nervous...
Leave the handling of the astrodrill to me!
Where's the phainite!?
Good work!
That pilot wasn't half bad.
Layers upon layers of crystalline glass...
What a curious star, this Phaenna.
I'll operate the mech!
An op in a cavern, eh...
Lower the output a notch. Gently, now!
Such power!
Excellent work out there!
Warp loaders are simply the best!
Deliver the phainite here!
The field scanners remain fully operational on this star as well.
Begin mining from a quicksand pit once you have sufficient ionic energy!
Accumulate ionic energy to begin mining!
Bring the glass fragments here!
Find us some glass clusters, field scanners!
Mech pilots, pulverize the large glass clusters!
Look at the warp loader go!
